name: io.github.dev-flexorch/flexorch-mcp
title: FlexOrch
description: Document classification, structured field extraction, PII masking, and LLM-ready dataset export for AI agents. Process PDFs, DOCX, invoices, contracts, payroll sheets — get clean JSONL for fine-tuning or RAG chunks for LangChain/LlamaIndex.

environmentVariables.name: FLEXORCH_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: FlexOrch API key — get one at app.flexorch.com/settings
